channel.title: Allgäu Travel on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Allgäu Travel on Share Hub

item.title: Füssen Travel Guide | Alpine Medieval Town Beyond Neuschwanstein (2025)
item.description: Everyone goes to Füssen for Neuschwanstein — but leaves without seeing the town itself. This guide is for the city: Hohes Schloss with its trompe l’œil windows, the Altstadt, the Lech River canyon and nearby Forggensee.

item.title: Lindau Travel Guide | Island City on Lake Constance | 2 Hours from Munich (2025)
item.description: Lindau is a small island city on Lake Constance (Bodensee) in Bavaria, neighboring Austria and Switzerland. Harbor lion, colorful houses, lake views. 2 hours from Munich with Deutschlandticket.

item.title: Memmingen Travel Guide | Medieval City 1.5 Hours from Munich (2025)
item.description: Memmingen is one of Bavaria’s least-known but best-preserved medieval towns. Near-complete city walls, Marktplatz, half-timbered buildings — a small but complete open-air museum. 1.5 hours from Munich with Deutschlandticket.
